zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquet於1190年出生在法國米迪-列內斯塔-吉加洛卡斯特爾薩拉辛奧維拉時，他的父親Bernard I de Lomagne35歲，母親Géraldesse de Foix33歲。他和Pincelle d’Albret至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1245年3月22日在法國米迪-列內斯阿馬尼亞克享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquet was born in 1190, in Auvillar, Castelsarrasin, Tarn-et-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France, his father, Bernard I de Lomagne, was 35 and his mother, Géraldesse de Foix, was 33. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Pincelle d’Albret. He died on 22 March 1245, in Armagnac, Midi-Pyrénées, France, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquet est né en 1190, à Auvillar, Castelsarrasin, Tarn-et-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France, son père, Bernard I de Lomagne, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Géraldesse de Foix, avait 33 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Pincelle d’Albret. Il est décédé le 22 mars 1245, à Armagnac, Midi-Pyrénées, France, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquet 1190 in Auvillar, Castelsarrasin, Tarn-et-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bernard I de Lomagne 35 und seine Mutter Géraldesse de Foix 33. Er hatte mit Pincelle d’Albret mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 22. März 1245 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Armagnac, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquet è nato il nel 1190 nel Auvillar, Castelsarrasin, Tarn-et-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, il suo padre, Bernard I de Lomagne, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Géraldesse de Foix, aveva 33 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Pincelle d’Albret. Morì il 22 marzo 1245, nel Armagnac, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquetが1190年にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスターン-エト-ガーオンカステルサラシンアウヴィラーで生まれた時，父Bernard I de Lomagneは35歳，母Géraldesse de Foixは33歳であった。彼はPincelle d’Albretとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1245年3月22日にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスアルマグナックで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquet(이)가 1190년 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 터아른-트-가니 카스텔사라신 오비라에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bernard I de Lomagne(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Géraldesse de Foix(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Pincelle d’Albret(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1245년 3월 22일 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 아마그나크에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquet nasceu em 1190, em Auvillar, Castelsarrasin, Tarn-et-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, França, seu pai, Bernard I de Lomagne, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Géraldesse de Foix, tinha 33 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Pincelle d’Albret. Ele faleceu em 22 de março de 1245, em Armagnac, Midi-Pyrénées, França, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquet родился в 1190 г. в местности аувиллар, кастелсаррасин, тарн-ет-гаронн, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Bernard I de Lomagne было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Géraldesse de Foix, 33. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Pincelle d’Albret. Он умер 22 марта 1245 г. в местности армагнак, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquet nació en 1190, en Auvillar, Castelsarrasin, Tarn-et-Garonne, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, su papá, Bernard I de Lomagne, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Géraldesse de Foix, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Pincelle d’Albret. Murió el 22 de marzo de 1245, en Armagnac, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, a la edad de 55 años.
